onboarding.welcome: Welcome to the new UTP Benefits app!
onboarding.subtitle: Discounts and deals made for you, accessible to everyone.

login.tagline: Own your days with UTP Benefits!
login.termsPrefix: I have read and accept the
login.successMessage: Signed in. Welcome to UTP Benefits!
login.errorMessage: We couldn't sign you in. Check your code and password.

errors.codeFormat: Invalid format. Use only digits, or the letter U followed by digits.
errors.passwordShort: The password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and conditions to continue.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: By using UTP Benefits you accept the following terms of use:
terms.body: Discounts and coupons are for personal, non-transferable use, are subject to availability at each store, and may have an expiration date. UTP Benefits is not responsible for price or stock changes made by affiliated merchants. Your data is used only to verify your student status.

home.comingSoon: This feature will be available soon.

locationModal.title: Allow UTP Benefits to access this device's location?
locationModal.note: This is a simulation: the app does not actually access your location.
locationModal.preciseAlt: Precise location preview: zoomed-in map with an exact marker.
locationModal.safeAlt: Safe location preview: zoomed-out map with an approximate area.

placeholder.genericBody: This section is under construction. You'll be able to use it here very soon.

profile.title: Student profile
profile.focusMode: Enable visible focus for better attention

dealDetail.couponSection: Your ticket will be shown here

bembos.location:
Lima - Los Olivos
Near UTP Lima Norte
detailsTerms: Valid for in-store redemption and delivery orders.
You must show your UTP app code.
Available at locations nationwide.

bembos-combo.title: Regular Cheese + regular fries + 1 soda
bembos-combo.description: Take advantage of this in-store or delivery promotion by showing your UTP app code.
bembos-combo.imageAlt: Bembos Parrillera and Extremo combo with fries and Inca Kola

bembos-queso-tocino.title: 1 Bacon Cheese + 1 regular fries
bembos-queso-tocino.description: Bacon Cheese burger plus regular fries at a special price for UTP students.
bembos-queso-tocino.imageAlt: Bembos Bacon Cheese burger with regular fries

entel.location:
Lima
Benefit available at select Entel stores
detailsTerms: Valid for UTP students with a valid ID.
Subject to Entel credit evaluation.
Not combinable with other promotions.
Benefit available at participating stores.

entel-equipo-540.title: Up to S/. 540 off select devices
entel-equipo-540.description: Valid only on devices shown in the product details.
entel-equipo-540.imageAlt: Entel smartphones with up to S/. 540 discount

entel-equipo-300.title: Up to S/. 300 off select devices
entel-equipo-300.description: Applies to select models, subject to availability.
entel-equipo-300.imageAlt: Entel phones with up to S/. 300 discount

entel-plan-power.title: 20% off Plan Power 99.90
entel-plan-power.description: Get 20% off your Plan Power 99.90 for the duration of the promotion.

entel-accesorios.title: 15% off select accessories
entel-accesorios.description: Discount valid for headphones, chargers, speakers, and other participating accessories.

eset.location:
Lima
Benefit available for online purchases
detailsTerms: Valid only for purchases through the official online store.
The license is delivered by email after payment confirmation.
Not combinable with other promotions.

eset-antivirus-1pc.title: ESET Internet Security 1 device x 1 year

eset-antivirus-3pc.description: Protect up to 3 devices with a single digital license.
eset-antivirus-3pc.imageAlt: ESET Internet Security license for 3 devices

detailsTerms: Valid for UTP students with a valid ID card.
Does not apply to cycle renewals.
Spots subject to availability at each location.

detailsTerms: Valid for in-store dining by showing your UTP code.
